title: saprosma scabrida
intro: Saprosma scabrida is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved saprosma. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Saprosma scabrida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for various purposes, and its leaves may also be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules.
